name: Kerberoasting
description: Kerberoasting detects adversaries requesting TGS tickets for service accounts using weak RC4 encryption (0x17), enabling offline password cracking. Focuses on non-machine accounts with anomalous volume thresholds to reduce false positives.

search.filter:
#event_simpleName = "KerberosServiceTicketRequested" OR #event_simpleName = "KerberosTicketGrantingService"
| EventType = "4769"
| TicketEncryptionType = "0x17"
| Status = "0x0"
| ServiceName != /\$$/
| ServiceName != "krbtgt"
| ServiceName != /^\$/
| AccountName != /\$@/
| groupBy([AccountName, ServiceName, ClientAddress], function=count())
| _count > 3
| rename(ClientAddress, as="AttackerIP")
| rename(AccountName, as="RequestingAccount")
| rename(ServiceName, as="TargetServiceAccount")
